title: eos service configuration
description: Configuration schema for eos service.yaml files

name.description: Unique name for the service. Used to reference it in all eos commands.

command.description: The entry point script or binary to run. Relative to the service directory or an absolute path.

port.description: Port the service listens on. Displayed in eos status.

memory_limit_mb.description: Soft memory limit in megabytes. eos will restart the service when exceeded.

env_file.description: Path to a .env file to load into the service's environment. Relative to the service directory.

runtime.description: Runtime configuration. Required when the service needs a specific runtime binary (Node.js, Bun, Deno).

path.description: Absolute or home-relative (~/) path to the directory containing the runtime binary.
